# SARKSH GROW

SARKSH GROW is a Hyderabad-based FinTech company and financial institution in build phase. The public website focuses on free market awareness, demat account education, trading learning, risk clarity and product pathways for Indian families and people new to the market.

Current public activity: free education and awareness. Regulated services, broking, advisory and PMS-related offerings will move forward only after applicable approvals and compliance readiness.

Products described: SARKSH Trade, SARKSH PMS and SARKSH Expertise Sale. SARKSH Expertise Sale is a major planned project under patenting and regulatory work.

Risk note: SARKSH GROW does not guarantee returns or market outcomes.
